title: Quieter Minecarts
description: Quieter Minecarts is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that reduces the volume of the vanilla minecart sounds.
body:
**Quieter Minecarts** is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that reduces the volume of the vanilla minecart sounds.

The sounds themselves are unchanged in terms of tone and behaviour. They are simply quieter, making longer journeys and rail-heavy builds or automations more comfortable without removing the vanilla charme.

This pack is ideal if you enjoy using minecarts but find their default volume distracting or overpowering compared to other game sounds, or if you're playing with friends and cannot hear their voice while moving from one place to another in a minecart.

**Note:** _All sound assets are originally created and owned by Mojang Studios / Microsoft. This resource pack only adjusts the volume of the existing minecart sounds and does not claim ownership of, or rights to any original content._
